TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nabakuwan Bakung a niyazu' nu walian u walibayu Nabakuwan Bakung a niyazu' nu walian u walibayu,satipan u sadipasan a buyu' musuayaw tu bayu musuzikus tu buyu' ku liwlw, micidek ku salungan nu buyu' nanum, nu Nabukuwan u singanganay piidangan a kitizaan, duduc han ku 11 a zazan mayzaay i timul a zazan itini i 31.5 kungli, itini i paciy u satalakaway a picekulan,taynihan micekul taneng maazih ku liakung nu bayu nu kaluluwan atu takemu mahizaay u bilanga a buyu' atuwca u tepad nu patelungan, salungan mahapinang ku kulit nu bayu buyu' a mililid tu labang a pateng sa atayni pasaluimeng tu kazizeng miazih tu liwliw.i sadipan nu kaluluwan takemu piidangan piculilan a buyu' u tanaya niya buyu' sa 910 depah, tanga sa i satalakaway a maazih min ku liakung a bayu nu kaluluwan a niyazu'; uzuma izawnay ku cacay baluhay kanamuhan a piidangan, tunu sumamadaynay a zazan u "kaliyuhan nu ina ku wawa mahetik i bayu‚Äě, 2017 a mihcaan pihibangan nu micudaday kya tatengaaytu pacumud tu labang a papiazih , uyni tapiingan nu tepad dadinguay zazan, katalawan kamilmillan nu midangay a labang,
S.PHON: nabakuwan bakuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° nu war~…ĺian u war~…ĺibaju nabakuwan bakuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° nu war~…ĺian u war~…ĺibaju,satipan u sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° musuajaw tu baju musuzikus tu buju Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺw, mi ¶id…ôk ku sar~…ĺuŇčan nu buju Ē~ ° nanum, nu nabukuwan u siŇčaŇčanaj piidaŇčan a kitizaan, dudu ¶ ńßan ku ** a zazan majzaaj i timur~…ĺ a zazan itini i **.* kuŇčr~…ĺi, itini i pa ¶ij u satar~…ĺakawaj a pi ¶…ôkur~…ĺan,tajnińßan mi ¶…ôkur~…ĺ tan…ôŇč maazińß ku r~…ĺiakuŇč nu baju nu kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan atu tak…ômu mańßizaaj u bir~…ĺaŇča a buju Ē~ ° atuw ¶a u t…ôpad nu pat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, sar~…ĺuŇčan mańßapinaŇč ku kur~…ĺit nu baju buju Ē~ ° a mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu r~…ĺabaŇč a pat…ôŇč sa atajni pasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč miazińß tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw.i sadipan nu kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan tak…ômu piidaŇčan pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a buju Ē~ ° u tanaja nija buju Ē~ ° sa *** d…ôpańß, taŇča sa i satar~…ĺakawaj a maazińß min ku r~…ĺiakuŇč a baju nu kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan a nijazu Ē~ °; uzuma izawnaj ku ¶a ¶aj bar~…ĺuńßaj kanamuńßan a piidaŇčan, tunu sumamadajnaj a zazan u "kar~…ĺijuńßan nu ina ku wawa mańß…ôtik i baju*, **** a mińß ¶aan pińßibaŇčan nu mi ¶udadaj kja tat…ôŇčaajtu pa ¶umud tu r~…ĺabaŇč a papiazińß , ujni tapiiŇčan nu t…ôpad dadiŇčuaj zazan, katar~…ĺawan kamir~…ĺmir~…ĺr~…ĺan nu midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč,
S.FORM: Nabakuwan Bakung a niyazu' nu walian u walibayu Nabakuwan Bakung a niyazu' nu walian u walibayu,satipan u sadipasan a buyu' musuayaw tu bayu musuzikus tu buyu' ku liwlw, micidek ku salungan nu buyu' nanum, nu Nabukuwan u singanganay piidangan a kitizaan, duduc han ku 11 a zazan mayzaay i timul a zazan itini i 31.5 kungli, itini i paciy u satalakaway a picekulan,taynihan micekul taneng maazih ku liakung nu bayu nu kaluluwan atu takemu mahizaay u bilanga a buyu' atuwca u tepad nu patelungan, salungan mahapinang ku kulit nu bayu buyu' a mililid tu labang a pateng sa atayni pasaluimeng tu kazizeng miazih tu liwliw.i sadipan nu kaluluwan takemu piidangan piculilan a buyu' u tanaya niya buyu' sa 910 depah, tanga sa i satalakaway a maazih min ku liakung a bayu nu kaluluwan a niyazu'; uzuma izawnay ku cacay baluhay kanamuhan a piidangan, tunu sumamadaynay a zazan u "kaliyuhan nu ina ku wawa mahetik i bayu‚Äě, 2017 a mihcaan pihibangan nu micudaday kya tatengaaytu pacumud tu labang a papiazih , uyni tapiingan nu tepad dadinguay zazan, katalawan kamilmillan nu midangay a labang,
S.PHON: nabakuwan bakuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° nu war~…ĺian u war~…ĺibaju nabakuwan bakuŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° nu war~…ĺian u war~…ĺibaju,satipan u sadipasan a buju Ē~ ° musuajaw tu baju musuzikus tu buju Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺw, mi ¶id…ôk ku sar~…ĺuŇčan nu buju Ē~ ° nanum, nu nabukuwan u siŇčaŇčanaj piidaŇčan a kitizaan, dudu ¶ ńßan ku ** a zazan majzaaj i timur~…ĺ a zazan itini i **.* kuŇčr~…ĺi, itini i pa ¶ij u satar~…ĺakawaj a pi ¶…ôkur~…ĺan,tajnińßan mi ¶…ôkur~…ĺ tan…ôŇč maazińß ku r~…ĺiakuŇč nu baju nu kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan atu tak…ômu mańßizaaj u bir~…ĺaŇča a buju Ē~ ° atuw ¶a u t…ôpad nu pat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, sar~…ĺuŇčan mańßapinaŇč ku kur~…ĺit nu baju buju Ē~ ° a mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu r~…ĺabaŇč a pat…ôŇč sa atajni pasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč miazińß tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw.i sadipan nu kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan tak…ômu piidaŇčan pi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a buju Ē~ ° u tanaja nija buju Ē~ ° sa *** d…ôpańß, taŇča sa i satar~…ĺakawaj a maazińß min ku r~…ĺiakuŇč a baju nu kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan a nijazu Ē~ °; uzuma izawnaj ku ¶a ¶aj bar~…ĺuńßaj kanamuńßan a piidaŇčan, tunu sumamadajnaj a zazan u "kar~…ĺijuńßan nu ina ku wawa mańß…ôtik i baju*, **** a mińß ¶aan pińßibaŇčan nu mi ¶udadaj kja tat…ôŇčaajtu pa ¶umud tu r~…ĺabaŇč a papiazińß , ujni tapiiŇčan nu t…ôpad dadiŇčuaj zazan, katar~…ĺawan kamir~…ĺmir~…ĺr~…ĺan nu midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč,
